title: Language detection + routing for non-English items
output: Language detection + routing module (TypeScript) committed via PR.
acceptanceCriteria: Language detection runs on every cleared item using LoC metadata language fields.
Detected language(s) are recorded in the cleared-item contract's language field.
Non-English items receive a routing hint pointing to the translation downstream lane.
Language detection does not block the pipeline for items with no language metadata (defaults to unknown, not an error).
pnpm build and pnpm test and pnpm lint pass.
context: The fan-out contract records detected language(s) and suggests downstream lanes. Non-English cleared items should route to the translation lane (public-domain-translations). This task adds language detection to the pipeline and wires the routing hint into the cleared-item contract. Unscheduled backlog; small addition that enables the translation lane to receive correctly-routed items.
objective: Add a language-detection step to the pipeline that identifies the primary language(s) of each cleared item from its metadata, records them in the cleared-item contract, and sets a routing hint to the translation lane for non-English items.
